emails.subject: RE: Extension letter
emails.body: RE: Extension letter Kay, Only comment is the RE: line. Perhaps change to something like "Interim Letter Agreement Continuance to June 15, 2001." Dave is clear on this as well. No other comments. Thanks Reagan C. Rorschach Enron North America 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002 713.345.3363
